questions.title: Q1: Tell me about yourself
questions.text: I'm a software engineer with 3 years of experience building web applications. I specialize in React and Node.js, and I'm passionate about creating clean, maintainable code.

questions.title: Q2: Why this company?
questions.text: I've been following your work on [product] and I'm impressed by the engineering culture. The scale of problems you solve aligns with where I want to grow.

questions.title: Q3: Biggest challenge?
questions.text: I led a migration from a monolith to microservices. The hardest part was maintaining uptime during the transition. We used feature flags and gradual traffic shifting to achieve zero downtime. [STOP]

sections.title: My Questions
items: What does a typical day look like on this team?
How do you approach technical debt?
